summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VakilSetu Legal Intelligence Engine. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for Intelligence Engine flow (describe -> keywords -> questions -> analysis -> NyayID), My Cases page, Affidavit Builder, and navigation.

issues: Some irrelevant laws shown (e.g., IPC 302 Murder for security deposit case) - this is due to MOCKED vector similarity using hash-based embeddings instead of real OpenAI embeddings

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Vector similarity search uses hash-based embeddings instead of real OpenAI embeddings - this causes some irrelevant law matches but core functionality works
seed_data_creation: Test users seeded on startup. Test cases created during testing with NyayID.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Intelligence Engine features tested and working: keyword extraction, decision tree questions (5 categories), case analysis with AI, risk analysis, NyayID generation, stamp paper diagnostic, consultation requests, affidavit generation, translation, and case saving. My Cases page shows case tracker with status history. Vector similarity uses MOCKED hash-based embeddings.
